      AWARD-WINNING  CHAIN

      over 4000+ reviews

      35+

      YEARS OF  EXCELLENCE

      highest rated spa in malta

      Carisma Spa is Malta's most-awarded chain, with over 35+ years. We've helped thousands of Maltese locals and visitors unwind with everything from deep-tissue bodywork to full-day experiences at 8 locations. Our world-class facilities include Finnish saunas, wet saunas, steam rooms, jacuzzis, hydro-jet pools, an authentic Turkish hammam, indoor and outdoor pools, and salt rooms. Soak in the hot tub after a treatment, unwind in the sauna before a hammam ritual, or spend the afternoon poolside, however you like to switch off, we've got you covered.

      award-winning spa treatments in malta

      Recognized as the highest-rated venues on the island, our award-winning treatments relieve tension, alleviate pain, reduce stress, or simply let you spend the day enjoying the pool, sauna, jacuzzi, and steam rooms. Whether you're after your first treatment, a rejuvenating facial, or a full wellness day, you've come to the right place.

      massages

      From deep tissue to hot stone, Swedish to Indian Ayurvedic — our massage menu covers every need. Local guests keep coming back because our therapists actually listen. Book your session, then stay for the pool.
       

      • Sports Massage & Deep Tissue Massage

      • Hot Stone Massage Therapy

      • Indian Ayurvedic Massages

      • Prenatal Massages

      • Anti-stress/ Swedish Relaxation Massage

       

      Delivered by certified therapists across all 8 spa locations

      from €59

      BOOK NOW

      facials

      Clinical results at a relaxed pace. Every facial at our Maltese venues uses Phytomer marine skincare from France — built on 50 years of marine science.
       

      • Deep Cleansing Facial

      • Anti-Ageing & Firming Facial

      • Hydration Rescue Facial

      • Acne & Blemish Control
         

      Your therapist tailors every session to what your skin actually needs, not a one-size-fits-all menu. Pair it with time in the jacuzzi for the full wellness experience.

      from €55

      BOOK NOW

      Laser hair removal

      Smooth, lasting results with medical-grade laser technology — Our certified technicians tailor every session to your skin type for safe, effective hair reduction.
       

      • Full Leg Laser Hair Removal

      • Underarm & Bikini Laser

      • Full Body Laser Package

      • Facial Laser Hair Removal
         

      Book your session and enjoy smooth, confident skin all year round.

      from €25

      BOOK NOW

      hammam

      Malta's only authentic Turkish hammam. Step into the steam rooms, exfoliate with a traditional body scrub, and let everything else fall away. There's nothing quite like it, and Carisma is the only place you'll find one.
       

      • Traditional Hammam Ritual

      • Hammam + Full Body Massage

      • Private Hammam for Couples

      • Body Scrub & Detox Wrap
         

      Pair your ritual with a dip in the pool, a long soak in the whirlpool, and 20 minutes in the sauna; that's a proper local day out.

      from €59

      BOOK NOW

      sessions

      Specialist therapies for guests who need something more targeted, popular with locals who come in regularly.
       

      • Osteopathy

      • Lymphatic Drainage

      • Reflexology

      • Cupping Therapy
         

      Delivered by qualified practitioners at select locations. Stay for the pool, sauna, and whirlpool after your session.

      from €59

      BOOK NOW

      hydrafacial

      Discover the transformative power of HydraFacial, exclusively at Carisma Spa. Our unique serum delivery system targets deeper layers for superior hydration and anti-ageing benefits, more effective than a standard facial.
       

      • Deep Cleansing & Gentle Exfoliation

      • Painless Extractions & Pore Refinement

      • Intense Hydration & Serum Infusion

      • Visible Results From Your First Session
         

      Every package includes a complimentary 3h spa day facility pass. Powered by Phytomer marine skincare for lasting radiance.

      from €99

      Priority treatment scheduling

      Join the Carisma membership and get unlimited access to pools, saunas, jacuzzis, steam rooms, and Turkish baths across all our Maltese locations. Most local members tell us the same thing: once you start coming for the thermal facilities and water amenities, you don't stop.

      marine based skin care

      Every massage, facial, and treatment at Carisma Spas uses Phytomer -- a French marine skincare brand built on 50 years of ocean science. It's why your skin still feels different days after your visit. We're the exclusive Phytomer spa in Malta, and our therapists are trained directly by the brand. If you'd like to continue the results at home, our full product range is available in-store and online.

      explore home care

      spa locations

      Find a carisma Spas Near You in Malta

      Every Carisma location is a world of its own. You'll find saunas, steam rooms, an authentic Turkish hammam, jacuzzis, indoor pools, a traditional Maltese bath, salt rooms, and fully equipped fitness suites. Some guests come for a single treatment. Most end up staying the whole afternoon. Our spas each offer a different combination of facilities. Whether you're after a quiet solo escape or a full spa day, there's a Carisma near you that fits.

      what makes carisma the
      best-rated spa in malta?

      Eight locations. Over 35 years. And 4000+ five-star reviews from guests who keep coming back. But what really sets us apart isn't the numbers -- it's what happens when you walk through our doors.

       

      A team of certified therapists who remember how you like your pressure. Phytomer marine skincare from France. Malta's only authentic hammam. World class ammenities across hydro-jet jacuzzis, dry and wet saunas, mix of indoor and outdoor pools and a pace that never rushes you out. This is spa in Malta, done properly.​

      EXPLORE SPA DAY PACKAGES

      Frequently asked questions

      What is the best spa in Malta?

      Carisma Spa & Wellness is Malta's highest-rated spa chain, with 4,250+ five-star Google reviews across 8 locations. We've been here for over 35+ years long before wellness was a trend. Our therapists are certified, our skincare is Phytomer from France, and we're the only spa in Malta with an authentic Turkish hammam. That combination is why guests keep coming back.

      How much does a massage cost in Malta?

      At Carisma Spa, massages start from €55 for a classic relaxation or deep tissue session. Signature treatments and longer durations range up to €200. Every massage is delivered by a certified therapist using Phytomer marine products, no shortcuts, no rushing. You can view our full treatment menu and book online.

      Do I need to book a spa day in advance?

      We recommend booking at least 24–48 hours ahead, especially for weekends and couples' packages. That said, walk-ins are always welcome across all 8 spa locations, we'll do our best to fit you in. For the full spa day experience with zero waiting, booking online is the easiest way.

      What should I bring to a spa day in Malta?

      Nothing but yourself. We provide robes, towels, slippers, and all the products you'll need. Just arrive 10–15 minutes early so you can settle in, and we'll take care of the rest. If you're visiting our hammam, swimwear is optional, it's a private experience.

      Can I buy a spa gift card in Malta?

      Yes. Carisma gift cards are available online and delivered to your inbox within minutes. Choose a set amount or a specific treatment, from a single massage to a full spa day package. Cards are redeemable across all 8 Carisma Spa locations in Malta, with no expiry pressure.

      Can I use a spa in Malta without staying at the hotel?

      Yes. All 8 Carisma Spa locations are open to non-hotel guests. Whether you're a local or visiting Malta, you can book any treatment or spa day package without a hotel reservation. Just book online or call us on +356 27802062.
